fact_policy.mechanically_extracted_source_bound: The declared operator deterministically maps a resolved source JSON node to the projection value.
fact_policy.nonmechanical_source_binding_typed_unkno: A candidate value whose bindings are curated, unresolved, or otherwise non-executable is removed and retained only as typed unknown with source identifiers, locators, and reason.
fact_policy.unknown_fields: Typed unknown fields never enter displayed known-value scope.
